Meta.title: Cleava | Cleaning Services in Finland
Meta.description: Professional home and office cleaning in Finland. Book easily — we confirm availability quickly by SMS or email.

OfferBar.offer: Launch Offer: 3 hours home cleaning + windows only 79EUR!

Hero.title: Spaces that feel
Hero.subtitle: Residential and commercial cleaning with care. Fast responses, flexible scheduling, and spotless results.

Services.title: What we do
Services.subtitle: Tailored cleaning — one-off or on a recurring schedule.

residential.title: Home cleaning
residential.desc: Apartments and houses. Kitchens, bathrooms, and thorough everyday cleaning.

commercial.title: Office & business
commercial.desc: Offices, retail, and shared spaces that stay presentable for teams and visitors.

deep.title: Deep & special cleans
deep.desc: Move-in/out, post-construction, seasonal work, and demanding jobs.

recurring.title: Scheduled service
recurring.desc: Weekly or monthly rhythm so your space stays consistently clean.

Why.title: Why Cleava?
Why.subtitle: A dependable partner that respects your time and your space.

verified.title: Professionals
verified.desc: Experienced cleaners and clear, repeatable processes.

flex.title: Flexible timing
flex.desc: We schedule around your day, not the other way around.

eco.title: Quality tools
eco.desc: Effective methods and meticulous attention to detail.

Reviews.title: Google reviews
Reviews.subtitle: See what clients say on Google.
Reviews.manualNote: Review text is stored in this site (see src/data/cleavaReviews.ts). Google does not publish a public API for that search page without a key — paste reviews there to list them all here.
Reviews.featuredQuote: The Cleava team went above and beyond! Professional, friendly, and detailed service – the results were simply outstanding.
Reviews.histogramCaption: Star mix from the reviews listed below
Reviews.listingMismatch: Google shows {google} reviews in total. Add more rows in cleavaReviews.ts to display them all here.

Cta.title: Ready for a cleaner space?
Cta.subtitle: Send a quote request — we confirm availability by message or email.

About.title: About us
About.lead: Cleava makes it easier to keep homes and workplaces spotless.
About.p1: We help households and businesses stay clean without the hassle. We listen to your needs and build a service that fits.
About.p2: Clear communication, agreed schedules, and professional execution — that is the Cleava way.

StoryPage.title: Our Story
StoryPage.lead: From a small local idea to a trusted cleaning partner in Finland.
StoryPage.p1: Cleava started with one goal: make cleaning services simple, dependable, and premium in quality. We noticed many clients wanted professional results without complicated booking and unclear communication.
StoryPage.p2: Today we serve homes and businesses with the same mindset — respectful teams, consistent standards, and transparent service from first contact to final check.

BlogsPage.title: Blog
BlogsPage.subtitle: Cleaning tips, practical guides, and updates from Cleava.

ServicesPage.title: Services
ServicesPage.intro: Choose the cleaning you need — we can combine services on request.
ServicesPage.included: Includes labour, equipment, and quality checks as agreed.

ServiceDetails.ctaBody: Tell us your preferred date and property details. We'll confirm quickly.

home-cleaning.title: Home Cleaning
home-cleaning.subtitle: Comfortable, spotless home cleaning for apartments and houses.
home-cleaning.description: Ideal for busy households. We focus on visible cleanliness and details in kitchens, bathrooms and living areas.

moving-cleaning.title: Moving Cleaning
moving-cleaning.subtitle: Move-out and move-in cleaning prepared for handover standards.
moving-cleaning.description: Before key handover, we deep clean high-use areas so the property is fresh and ready for the next occupant.
includes: Deep kitchen and appliance exterior cleaning

office-cleaning.title: Office Cleaning
office-cleaning.subtitle: Professional office cleaning to keep workspaces presentable daily.
office-cleaning.description: We help companies maintain a clean environment for teams and visitors with reliable scheduled service.
includes: Desks, shared areas and meeting rooms

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.intro: Tell us about your space and preferences — we will get back to you shortly.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been received.
